summary: Verified all fixes for user-reported build error. ProjectGrid.jsx compiles without syntax errors (ESLint passes). The original syntax error at line 108 has been fixed. Auto-verify + auto-revert code is present in message-stream.js (lines 2628-2665). While loop structure is correct (lines 1265-2820 contain all tool handlers). All unit tests pass (18/18 edit-lines, 4/4 agent-loop-edit-flow).

ui_bugs.issue: handleBulkArchive function is referenced at line 127 but never defined - will cause runtime error when Archive button is clicked
ui_bugs.note: Only affects users who enter select mode and select projects, then click Archive

action_items: Define handleBulkArchive function in ProjectGrid.jsx OR remove the Archive button if archiving is not implemented
critical_code_review_comments: ProjectGrid.jsx line 127: handleBulkArchive is undefined - this is likely leftover from the AI's broken injection that was partially fixed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 90 verified the user-reported build error fix. The original syntax error at line 108 is fixed. However, there's a minor bug: handleBulkArchive function is referenced but not defined (line 127). This will cause a runtime error if users click the Archive button in select mode.

frontend_login.note: Login with REDACTED_LEAKED_USER / REDACTED_LEAKED_PASSWORD works, redirects to dashboard

projectgrid_jsx_syntax.note: ESLint reports no issues - file compiles correctly

details.auto_verify_in_message_stream: lines 2628-2665 - auto-verify + auto-revert after edit_lines in self-edit mode

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: User reported build error: Emanator broke ProjectGrid.jsx by injecting raw unindented JSX (an 'Archived Projects' button) without proper context. Syntax error was 'Expected comma, got onClick' at ProjectGrid.jsx:108:1
bug_fix_verification.fix_status: VERIFIED - ProjectGrid.jsx now compiles without syntax errors
bug_fix_verification.remaining_issue: handleBulkArchive function is referenced but not defined - likely leftover from the broken injection
